title: CPU load goes up to 100% when Virtuoso runs its look up processing
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE Spot (id Int32, label String, categoryURI String, locality String, created DateTime, modified DateTime, outdoor UInt8, charge Decimal(10, 2), reservation UInt8, ageFrom Int32, ageTo Int32, url String, listImage String, detailImage String, openDate1 Date, openTime1 String, openDate2 Date, openTime2 String, promoter String, facilityURI String, description String);

INSERT INTO Spot (id, label, categoryURI, locality, created, modified, outdoor, charge, reservation, ageFrom, ageTo) VALUES (1, 'Sample Spot', 'http://www.example.com/LOD/sp/category/1', 'Sample Locality', now(), now(), 1, 10.50, 0, 5, 15);

INSERT INTO Spot (id, label, categoryURI, locality, created, modified, outdoor, charge, reservation, ageFrom, ageTo) VALUES (2, NULL, 'http://www.example.com/LOD/sp/category/2', 'Sample Locality', now(), now(), 0, NULL, 1, 0, 10);
SELECT COUNT(*) AS NumberOfQuads FROM Spot WHERE ageFrom IS NOT NULL AND ageTo IS NOT NULL;
SELECT * FROM Spot WHERE locality = 'Sample Locality' AND (charge IS NULL OR charge < 20.00);
key_bug_features: CPU load spikes during SPARQL look up processing
